rule: All three commands must pass before this build is marked complete. Do not mark IMPLEMENTED without evidence.
businessValidations: required fields must be present before submission
status transitions must follow Draft -> Submitted -> Approved/Rejected -> Archived
only the owner or an admin may edit a record while in Draft
a rejected record requires a reason before the owner can resubmit
businessValidationSource: local Domain Intelligence Engine only (pattern matched: Record-Lifecycle Workflow)
